title: The Legal Tender (Inscribed Notes) Act, 1964
full_text: The Legal Tender (Inscribed Notes) Act, 1964 वैध निविदा (अन्‍तर्लिखित नोट) अधिनियम, 1964 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196428 Act Number: 28 Enactment Date: 1964-09-30 Act Year: 1964 Short Title: The Legal Tender (Inscribed Notes) Act, 1964 Hindi Title: वैध निविदा (अन्‍तर्लिखित नोट) अधिनियम, 1964 Long Title: An Act to restrict the negotiability of currency and other notes inscribed with messages of a political character. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Economic Affairs Enforcement Date: 30-09-1964 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Legal Tender (Inscribed Notes) Act, 1964 Show all section Section 1. Short title and extent. Section 2. Notes bearing messages of a political character not to be legal tender. Section 3. Repeal and savings.
